fields.label: Node Name
fields.description: The canonical name for this BOM node — e.g. "Connector", "Core Tubings", "HKX". Used as the Link value in Kit Content Framework and Kit Content Mapping Item rows, and written to BOM Item.node when BOMs are generated.

fields.label: Keep Aggregated By Default
fields.description: Default value for the "Keep Aggregated (Custom Explosion)" checkbox when this node is loaded into a Kit Content Framework row. Overridable at the framework level and again at the mapping level — this is only a starting default, not a live constraint.
